variables.name: aws_region
variables.description: AWS region to deploy into (e.g. us-east-1).

variables.name: vpc_name
variables.description: Name tag for the VPC and all child resources.

variables.name: availability_zones
variables.description: Comma-separated AZs matching subnet counts (e.g. us-east-1a,us-east-1b).

variables.name: enable_nat_gateway
variables.description: Create a NAT Gateway for private subnet outbound traffic.

variables.name: environment
variables.description: Deployment environment tag (e.g. dev, staging, prod).
